reason: Contradictory exit code requirements: m15 DBB (exit-code-distinction-m15.test.ts) requires unknown commands return exitCode 127, while m12 DBB (exit-codes.test.ts) and m18 design require exitCode 2. Cannot satisfy both simultaneously.
triedSolutions: Verified both test files run against same source — one must fail regardless of implementation
resolution: Both affected tasks (task-1775576245522, task-1775571373147) completed. Exit code conflict reconciled by dev team.
